meaning: adj.位于,被置于境遇,处于...的立场
examples: The hotel is conveniently situated close to the beach.
The hotel is centrally situated with ample free parking.
The inn is picturesquely situated on the banks of the river.
Situated on the western fringe of Greece's Dodecanese islands, Karpathos itself feels rather remote.
Funfair Park is situated on 2.5 hectares and dates back to the mid-19th Century.
